description_long: This is a large, cylindrical metal barrel with a weathered, dark blue-gray finish and visible signs of rust and wear. The barrel features three prominent horizontal reinforcement bands encircling its body, giving it structural rigidity. The top is sealed with a fitted metal lid, which includes two small capped openings for filling or emptying contents. One side of the barrel displays a yellow triangular warning label with an exclamation mark, indicating hazardous or sensitive material inside. The surface texture is rough and matte, with patches of discoloration and corrosion typical of outdoor or industrial use. The overall appearance suggests it is designed for storing or transporting liquids or chemicals in urban or industrial environments.
description: A weathered, reinforced metal barrel with a sealed lid, capped openings, and a hazardous material warning label. The surface is rough, dark blue-gray, and shows signs of rust and wear.
description_view_0: The barrel is seen from the side, showing the sealed lid with two capped openings and the weathered, reinforced metal bands.
description_view_1: This view highlights the top of the barrel with a single visible capped opening and the reinforced bands, with no warning label visible.
description_view_2: The front of the barrel displays a yellow triangular warning label, along with the reinforced bands and capped lid.
description_view_3: The barrel is shown from the opposite side, with the lid and a single capped opening visible, but no warning label.
attribute_labeling_or_markings: yellow triangular warning label with exclamation mark
